amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 26 — paragraph 1 — introductory part
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 26 — paragraph 1 — introductory part

## Text proposed by the Commission

1. Before placing a high-risk AI system on the market, importers of such system shall ensure that:

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1. Before placing a high-risk AI system on the market, importers of such system shall ensure that such a system is in conformity with this Regulation by ensuring that :
commission_text: 1. Before placing a high-risk AI system on the market, importers of such system shall ensure that:
parliament_text: 1. Before placing a high-risk AI system on the market, importers of such system shall ensure that such a system is in conformity with this Regulation by ensuring that :
